title: At Curro Mossel Bay, we educate for adult life
description: BUSINESS NEWS - Curro Mossel Bay is more...
bodyText:
[{"type":"paragraph","text":"Sponsored Content","html":"Sponsored Content"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"BUSINESS NEWS - Curro Mossel Bay is more than a school; it's a thriving educational environment where learners are prepared to meet the demands of the modern world with confidence, creativity and character. As part of the Curro Holdings group, a leader in quality independent education, we bring global thinking to local classrooms.","html":"BUSINESS NEWS - Curro Mossel Bay is more than a school; it's a thriving educational environment where learners are prepared to meet the demands of the modern world with confidence, creativity and character. As part of the Curro Holdings group, a leader in quality independent education, we bring global thinking to local classrooms."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"From preschool to Grade 12, we offer dual-medium instruction in Afrikaans and English, giving families the choice of language that suits them best. With a maximum of 25 learners per class, individual attention is not just a promise; it’s a reality."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"We proudly offer the IEB (Independent Examinations Board) curriculum, widely recognised for its depth, critical thinking and academic rigour.","html":"We proudly offer the IEB (Independent Examinations Board) curriculum, widely recognised for its depth, critical thinking and academic rigour."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The IEB qualification is accepted at all South African universities and better equips learners to thrive in tertiary education and beyond. Our 100% matric pass rate for the past 11 years speaks to the strength of our academic programme and the dedication of our passionate, professional teachers.","html":"The IEB qualification is accepted at all South African universities and better equips learners to thrive in tertiary education and beyond. Our 100% matric pass rate for the past 11 years speaks to the strength of our academic programme and the dedication of our passionate, professional teachers."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"But at Curro Mossel Bay, we educate far beyond the classroom. Our learners take part in Real Life for Teens, a unique life-skills programme that builds emotional intelligence, financial literacy, decision-making skills, andreadiness for adult life.","html":"But at Curro Mossel Bay, we educate far beyond the classroom. Our learners take part in Real Life for Teens, a unique life-skills programme that builds emotional intelligence, financial literacy, decision-making skills, and
readiness for adult life."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"We are proud to be a school of the future; our facilities and opportunities reflect this vision.","html":"We are proud to be a school of the future; our facilities and opportunities reflect this vision."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Learners begin robotics and coding in the foundation phase, developing problem-solving skills from an early age. We also compete in national Esports leagues from our cutting edge gaming lab, complete with a green screen studio for digital content creation.","html":"Learners begin robotics and coding in the foundation phase, developing problem-solving skills from an early age. We also compete in national Esports leagues from our cutting edge gaming lab, complete with a green screen studio for digital content creation."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Sport also plays a vital role at our school. Our world-class facilities, including a floodlit astro field, allow for extended training opportunities and help us build strong ties with the local community. Creativity thrives here. Through our performing arts and music departments, learners are given space to express themselvesbeyond the classroom."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Our hockey teams can now enjoy the astro with floodlights at night.","html":"Our hockey teams can now enjoy the astro with floodlights at night."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"At the heart of this is Curro Create, a platform that celebrates individuality over competition.","html":"At the heart of this is Curro Create, a platform that celebrates individuality over competition."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Guided by industry experts, learners are mentored to explore and grow their natural creativity, with opportunities to shine on both the provincial and national stage. Yet the true heartbeat of CurroMossel Bay is its people. We are a school built on relationships, with learners, parents, and our broaderMossel Bay community.","html":"Guided by industry experts, learners are mentored to explore and grow their natural creativity, with opportunities to shine on both the provincial and national stage. Yet the true heartbeat of Curro
Mossel Bay is its people. We are a school built on relationships, with learners, parents, and our broader
Mossel Bay community."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Our school culture reflects warmth, inclusivity and a shared commitment to seeing every child grow into the best version of themselves.","html":"Our school culture reflects warmth, inclusivity and a shared commitment to seeing every child grow into the best version of themselves."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Vote for us here: https://www.bestofsouthafrica.co.za/mossel-bay/","html":"Vote for us here: https://www.bestofsouthafrica.co.za/mossel-bay/"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"At Curro Mossel Bay, we don't just prepare children for exams, we prepare them for life. For families seeking academic excellence, innovative learning and a nurturing community, Curro Mossel Bay is the smart choice.","html":"At Curro Mossel Bay, we don't just prepare children for exams, we prepare them for life. For families seeking academic excellence, innovative learning and a nurturing community, Curro Mossel Bay is the smart choice."},{"type":"list","items":["044 693 3488 | 071 671 0123","[email protected]","www.curro.co.za"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
